description: Executable coverage map for every public package entry declared by the rigyn workspace manifests.

evidenceLimits.reason: Real macOS Keychain and Windows DPAPI round trips require those operating systems; portable and failure behavior is exercised with bounded test doubles.
Tests use controlled clipboard processes and payloads rather than mutating the developer desktop clipboard.
Release tests use temporary homes and staged artifacts; this suite never changes the active user installation.
Protocol behavior is executed against deterministic transports; real account authorization and paid generation remain opt-in live tests.
Encoders and virtual-terminal behavior execute in CI; physical Kitty, iTerm, Windows Terminal, IME, and resize evidence is platform CI or manual evidence.
